> Use stable IDs so later decisions, designs, and implementation plans can trace back to the PRD clearly.

## Record Metadata

- `Status`: `draft`
- `Linked Decisions`: None yet.
- `Linked Designs`: None yet.
- `Linked Implementation Plans`: None yet.
- `Updated At`: `YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`
